arabic: وَعَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَذْبَحُ وَيَنْحَرُ بِالْمُصَلَّى. رَوَاهُ البُخَارِيّ

english.text:
Ibn ‘Umar said that God’s Messenger used to sacrifice and slaughter at the place of prayer. 

Bukhari transmitted it. Idain, 22, where “the Prophet” occurs in place of “God’s Messenger.”
